leadText: The Dynamax Band (Japanese: ダイマックスＢ Daimax Band) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII. It was invented by Oleana and allows a Trainer's Pokémon to Dynamax or Gigantamax in Power Spots and perform Max Moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Allows the player's Pokémon to Dynamax or Gigantamax in Power Spots and perform Max Moves and G-Max Moves , respectively. Each Trainer can only Dynamax or Gigantamax a Pokémon once per battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A Wishing Star has been affixed to it. It lets out a light that allows Pokémon to Dynamax when at a Power Spot.

Each Trainer can only Dynamax or Gigantamax a Pokémon once per battle. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A Wishing Star has been affixed to it. It lets out a light that allows Pokémon to Dynamax when at a Power Spot. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Route 2 (from Professor Magnolia after obtaining the Wishing Star )
